---
title: "The Tech Zone"
description: "Tech tutorials, dotfiles, and lessons from building my personal computing stack — Arch Linux, Neovim, tiling and scrolling window managers, and a privacy-first home setup."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

/* Tech Zone — its own terminal-flavored personality.
   We deliberately diverge from the Research Blog (blue, sans-serif)
   to signal: this is build logs, not literature. */
:root {
  --tz-accent: #22c55e;            /* terminal green */
  --tz-prompt: #38bdf8;             /* sky-cyan for the $ prompt char */
  --tz-warn:   #f59e0b;             /* amber for in-progress / warning */
  --tz-fail:   #ef4444;             /* red for failed-boot card */
  --tz-mono:   "Iosevka", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", ui-monospace,
               SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;

  --tz-card-bg:     #eef7ee;
  --tz-card-border: #b6c4ad;
  --tz-card-inner:  #f7fbf6;
  --tz-screen-bg:   #0f172a;        /* near-black terminal background */
  --tz-screen-fg:   #e2e8f0;
  --tz-screen-mute: #94a3b8;
}

body.quarto-dark {
  --tz-accent: #4ade80;
  --tz-prompt: #7dd3fc;
  --tz-warn:   #fbbf24;
  --tz-fail:   #f87171;
  --tz-card-bg:     rgba(31, 41, 55, 0.92);
  --tz-card-border: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  --tz-card-inner:  rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.65);
  --tz-screen-bg:   #020617;
  --tz-screen-fg:   #e2e8f0;
  --tz-screen-mute: #94a3b8;
}

/* Widen the content column so the header and cards have real room. */
.page-columns {
  grid-template-columns: [screen-start] 4rem [screen-start-inset] 0 [page-start] 0 [page-start-inset] 0 [body-start-outset] 0 [body-start] 0 [body-content-start] 1fr [body-content-end] 0 [body-end] 0 [body-end-outset] 0 [page-end-inset] 0 [page-end] 0 [screen-end-inset] 4rem [screen-end] !important;
}

main.content.column-page {
  padding-left: 0 !important;
  padding-right: 0 !important;
}

.tz-shell {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem clamp(1rem, 2vw, 2rem) 5rem;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

/* ─────────────────────────  TERMINAL HEADER  ───────────────────────── */

.tz-terminal {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 96rem;
  margin: 0 0 2.6rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 0.6rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--bg-secondary);
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02), 0 12px 30px -20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
}

.tz-terminal-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem;
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--bg-secondary), #000 8%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.tz-terminal-bar .dot {
  width: 0.7rem; height: 0.7rem; border-radius: 50%; background: #cbd5e1;
}
.tz-terminal-bar .dot.red    { background: #ef4444; }
.tz-terminal-bar .dot.yellow { background: #f59e0b; }
.tz-terminal-bar .dot.green  { background: #22c55e; }

.tz-terminal-bar .title {
  margin-left: 0.6rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.tz-terminal-body {
  padding: 1.4rem 1.4rem 1.6rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
}

.tz-prompt-line {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}

.tz-prompt-line .user { color: var(--tz-accent); font-weight: 700; }
.tz-prompt-line .sep  { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.tz-prompt-line .path { color: var(--tz-prompt); font-weight: 600; }
.tz-prompt-line .glyph { color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 0 0.35rem; }

.tz-title {
  margin: 0.3rem 0 0.7rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: clamp(1.85rem, 3.4vw, 2.6rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.tz-title .cursor {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0.55ch;
  margin-left: 0.15ch;
  background: var(--tz-accent);
  color: transparent;
  animation: tz-blink 1.05s steps(2, end) infinite;
}

@keyframes tz-blink { 50% { background: transparent; } }

.tz-intro {
  max-width: 68rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.65rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.97rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
}
.tz-intro:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

.tz-intro .label {
  color: var(--tz-accent);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.tz-intro code {
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 86%);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 70%);
  color: var(--tz-accent);
  padding: 0.02em 0.35em;
  border-radius: 0.25rem;
  font-size: 0.92em;
}

/* ─────────────────────────  FILTER STRIP  ───────────────────────── */

.tz-filter-strip {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.6rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.tz-filter-input {
  flex: 1 1 22rem;
  min-width: 14rem;
  max-width: 32rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem 0.55rem 2.2rem;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--tz-card-border);
  border-radius: 0.7rem;
  background:
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--bg-secondary), transparent 30%)
    url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='%2394a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='11' cy='11' r='7'/><line x1='21' y1='21' x2='16.65' y2='16.65'/></svg>") no-repeat 0.65rem center / 1rem 1rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: inherit;
  transition: border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

.tz-filter-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--tz-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-accent) 22%, transparent);
}

.tz-filter-count {
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.tz-filter-count strong { color: var(--tz-accent); font-weight: 700; }

/* ─────────────────────────  CARD GRID  ───────────────────────── */

.tz-section-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: var(--tz-accent);
}

.tz-section-kicker::before { content: "// "; opacity: 0.55; }

.tz-section-title {
  margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.4vw, 1.8rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.tz-card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.tz-card {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--tz-card-border);
  border-radius: 1.35rem;
  background: var(--tz-card-bg);
  overflow: hidden;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
}

.tz-card:hover,
.tz-card:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-accent) 38%, var(--tz-card-border));
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.10);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}

.tz-card:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-accent) 55%, transparent);
  outline-offset: 0.2rem;
}

.tz-card.failed:hover,
.tz-card.failed:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-fail) 38%, var(--tz-card-border));
}

.tz-card[hidden] { display: none; }

.tz-card-summary {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.1rem;
  padding: 1.55rem;
}

.tz-card-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.tz-tag {
  padding: 0.28rem 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1.2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-accent) 35%, var(--tz-card-border));
  color: var(--tz-accent);
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 90%);
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.tz-tag::before { content: "#"; opacity: 0.6; margin-right: 0.05em; }

.tz-card.failed .tz-tag {
  color: var(--tz-fail);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-fail) 35%, var(--tz-card-border));
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-fail), transparent 90%);
}

.tz-card-name-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}

.tz-card-number {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 2rem; height: 2rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 82%);
  color: var(--tz-accent);
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.tz-card.failed .tz-card-number {
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-fail), transparent 82%);
  color: var(--tz-fail);
}

.tz-card-name {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.tz-card-meta {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.tz-card-date::before { content: "[ "; opacity: 0.55; }
.tz-card-date::after  { content: " ]"; opacity: 0.55; }

.tz-status-pill {
  padding: 0.18rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border: 1px solid currentColor;
}

.tz-status-pill.ok    { color: var(--tz-accent); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 92%); }
.tz-status-pill.warn  { color: var(--tz-warn);   background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-warn),   transparent 92%); }
.tz-status-pill.fail  { color: var(--tz-fail);   background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-fail),   transparent 92%); }

.tz-card-preview-copy {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.tz-card-cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--tz-accent);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  transition: gap 0.18s ease;
}

.tz-card.failed .tz-card-cta { color: var(--tz-fail); }

.tz-card:hover .tz-card-cta,
.tz-card:focus-visible .tz-card-cta { gap: 0.7rem; }

.tz-card-cta .arrow { transition: transform 0.18s ease; }
.tz-card:hover .tz-card-cta .arrow,
.tz-card:focus-visible .tz-card-cta .arrow { transform: translateX(2px); }

/* ──── The "screen" preview inside each card — a mock terminal session ──── */

.tz-screen {
  background: var(--tz-screen-bg);
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--tz-screen-bg) 50%, var(--tz-card-border));
  overflow: hidden;
  font-family: var(--tz-mono);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--tz-screen-fg);
  position: relative;
}

.tz-screen-bar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  color: var(--tz-screen-mute);
}

.tz-screen-bar .dot {
  width: 0.55rem; height: 0.55rem; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
}
.tz-screen-bar .dot.red    { background: #ef4444; }
.tz-screen-bar .dot.yellow { background: #f59e0b; }
.tz-screen-bar .dot.green  { background: #22c55e; }

.tz-screen-bar .label {
  margin-left: 0.3rem;
  flex: 1;
}

.tz-screen-bar .badge {
  padding: 0.05rem 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.tz-screen-bar .badge.ok   { color: var(--tz-accent); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-accent), transparent 82%); }
.tz-screen-bar .badge.fail { color: var(--tz-fail);   background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--tz-fail),   transparent 82%); }

.tz-screen-body {
  padding: 0.95rem 1.05rem 1.1rem;
  white-space: pre;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.tz-screen .p   { color: var(--tz-screen-mute); }
.tz-screen .u   { color: var(--tz-accent); font-weight: 600; }
.tz-screen .c   { color: var(--tz-prompt); }
.tz-screen .ok  { color: var(--tz-accent); }
.tz-screen .err { color: var(--tz-fail); font-weight: 600; }
.tz-screen .w   { color: var(--tz-warn); }
.tz-screen .mute { color: var(--tz-screen-mute); }

/* ─────────────────────────  RESPONSIVE  ───────────────────────── */

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .tz-card-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .page-columns {
    grid-template-columns: [screen-start] 0.5rem [screen-start-inset] 0 [page-start] 0 [page-start-inset] 0 [body-start-outset] 0 [body-start] 0 [body-content-start] 1fr [body-content-end] 0 [body-end] 0 [body-end-outset] 0 [page-end-inset] 0 [page-end] 0 [screen-end-inset] 0.5rem [screen-end] !important;
  }
  .tz-shell { padding: 2.5rem 0.75rem 4rem; }
  .tz-terminal-body { padding: 1.1rem 1rem 1.3rem; }
  .tz-card-summary  { padding: 1.25rem; }
  .tz-screen-body   { font-size: 0.74rem; }
}
</style>

<div class="tz-shell">

  <!-- ─────── Page lead-in (above the terminal header) ─────── -->
  <p class="tz-section-kicker">latest entries</p>
  <h2 class="tz-section-title">Articles &amp; build logs.</h2>

  <!-- ─────── Terminal-styled section header ─────── -->
  <div class="tz-terminal" role="img" aria-label="Terminal window header for The Tech Zone">
    <div class="tz-terminal-bar">
      <span class="dot red"></span>
      <span class="dot yellow"></span>
      <span class="dot green"></span>
      <span class="title">evannsmc@tech-zone: ~</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tz-terminal-body">
      <p class="tz-prompt-line">
        <span class="user">evannsmc</span><span class="sep">@</span><span class="user">arch</span><span class="glyph">:</span><span class="path">~/tech-zone</span><span class="glyph">$</span> cat README.md
      </p>
      <h1 class="tz-title">The Tech Zone<span class="cursor">_</span></h1>
      <p class="tz-intro">
        Tech tutorials, dotfiles, and lessons from building my personal computing stack piece by piece.
      </p>
      <p class="tz-intro">
        <span class="label">Currently:</span> my first <code>Arch Linux</code> install on an old laptop —
        on the way to a dual-boot Ubuntu/Arch workstation with <code>BTRFS</code>, <code>LUKS</code>,
        and <code>zram</code>, and eventually a triple-boot with a minimal Windows partition for
        collaborators who live in Office-suite land.
      </p>
      <p class="tz-intro">
        <span class="label">Next on this thread:</span> <code>Neovim</code> from scratch, tiling and scrolling
        window managers, and whatever else I break and fix.
      </p>
      <p class="tz-intro">
        <span class="label">Eventually:</span> a privacy-first home setup with custom DNS routing,
        a personal VPN I can connect to from anywhere, and self-hosted services on a NAS.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─────── Filter strip ─────── -->
  <div class="tz-filter-strip">
    <input
      class="tz-filter-input"
      type="search"
      placeholder="filter by title, topic, or #tag…"
      aria-label="Filter articles"
      autocomplete="off"
    />
    <span class="tz-filter-count" aria-live="polite">
      showing <strong id="tz-count-shown">2</strong> of <strong>2</strong>
    </span>
  </div>

  <!-- ─────── Card grid ─────── -->
  <div class="tz-card-grid" id="tz-card-grid">

    <!-- CARD 01 — Basic Arch install (success) -->
    <a class="tz-card success" href="./posts/2026-05-01-first-arch-install/"
       data-tags="arch linux first install ext4 grub systemd basic boot"
       aria-label="Read: My First Arch Linux Install — A Basic Setup on an Old Laptop">
      <div class="tz-card-summary">
        <div class="tz-card-tags">
          <span class="tz-tag">arch linux</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">first install</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">ext4</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">grub</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">systemd</span>
        </div>

        <div class="tz-card-name-row">
          <span class="tz-card-number">01</span>
          <h3 class="tz-card-name">My First Arch Linux Install: A Basic Setup on an Old Laptop</h3>
        </div>

        <div class="tz-card-meta">
          <span class="tz-card-date">2026-05-01</span>
          <span class="tz-status-pill ok">boot ok</span>
        </div>

        <p class="tz-card-preview-copy">
          A copy-pasteable walkthrough of installing Arch Linux 2026.05.01 on an old test laptop — verifying
          the ISO, partitioning, pacstrapping, configuring locale and users, and getting GRUB to actually boot
          the thing. No Btrfs, no LUKS, no zram — just the boring, dependable first install.
        </p>

        <div class="tz-screen" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="tz-screen-bar">
            <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            <span class="label">post-install — boot check</span>
            <span class="badge ok">boot ok</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tz-screen-body"><span class="p">[evannsmc@arch ~]$</span> <span class="c">lsblk</span>
NAME        SIZE  TYPE  MOUNTPOINTS
nvme0n1     465G  disk
├─nvme0n1p1   1G  part  /boot
├─nvme0n1p2  35G  part  <span class="mute">[SWAP]</span>
├─nvme0n1p3 200G  part  /
└─nvme0n1p4 229G  part  /home

<span class="p">[evannsmc@arch ~]$</span> <span class="c">systemctl is-system-running</span>
<span class="ok">running</span>

<span class="p">[evannsmc@arch ~]$</span> <span class="c">uname -r</span>
6.13.4-arch1-1<span class="u">_</span></div>
        </div>

        <span class="tz-card-cta">read the install log <span class="arrow">→</span></span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <!-- CARD 02 — Ambitious LUKS+Btrfs install (failed) -->
    <a class="tz-card failed" href="./posts/2026-05-05-arch-luks-btrfs-lessons/"
       data-tags="arch linux luks btrfs mkinitcpio debugging boot failure dual-boot ubuntu zram"
       aria-label="Read: An Ambitious Arch Install That Didn't Boot — LUKS, Btrfs, and What I Learned">
      <div class="tz-card-summary">
        <div class="tz-card-tags">
          <span class="tz-tag">arch linux</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">luks</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">btrfs</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">mkinitcpio</span>
          <span class="tz-tag">debugging</span>
        </div>

        <div class="tz-card-name-row">
          <span class="tz-card-number">02</span>
          <h3 class="tz-card-name">An Ambitious Arch Install That Didn't Boot — LUKS, Btrfs & Lessons</h3>
        </div>

        <div class="tz-card-meta">
          <span class="tz-card-date">2026-05-05</span>
          <span class="tz-status-pill fail">in progress</span>
        </div>

        <p class="tz-card-preview-copy">
          The opposite of the boring install: full-disk LUKS, Btrfs subvolumes for <code>/</code> and
          <code>/home</code>, zram swap, a shared data partition, and dual-boot with Ubuntu. GRUB loaded,
          the LUKS prompt accepted my passphrase, and then the kernel dropped me into emergency mode.
          The plan, the failure, and everything I've tried so far.
        </p>

        <div class="tz-screen" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="tz-screen-bar">
            <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            <span class="label">boot — emergency.target</span>
            <span class="badge fail">boot failed</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tz-screen-body"><span class="mute">A start job is running for /dev/disk/by-uuid/0e6caf44-…</span>
<span class="mute">A password is required to access the Arch volume.</span>

<span class="err">[FAIL]</span> <span class="mute">Timed out waiting for device</span>
        <span class="mute">/dev/disk/by-uuid/0e6caf44-...</span>
<span class="err">[DEPEND]</span> <span class="mute">Dependency failed for /sysroot.</span>
<span class="err">[DEPEND]</span> <span class="mute">Dependency failed for initrd-root-fs.target.</span>

<span class="w">You are in emergency mode.</span>

<span class="p">root@archiso ~ #</span> <span class="c">ls /dev/mapper</span>
control  arch  <span class="mute">…</span><span class="u">_</span></div>
        </div>

        <span class="tz-card-cta">read the post-mortem <span class="arrow">→</span></span>
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>

</div>

<script>
// Live filter for Tech Zone cards.
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var input = document.querySelector('.tz-filter-input');
  var grid  = document.getElementById('tz-card-grid');
  var count = document.getElementById('tz-count-shown');
  if (!input || !grid || !count) return;

  var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.tz-card'));

  function applyFilter() {
    var q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/^#/, '');
    var shown = 0;
    cards.forEach(function (card) {
      if (!q) { card.hidden = false; shown++; return; }
      var title = (card.querySelector('.tz-card-name') || {}).textContent || '';
      var tags  = card.getAttribute('data-tags') || '';
      var copy  = (card.querySelector('.tz-card-preview-copy') || {}).textContent || '';
      var hay = (title + ' ' + tags + ' ' + copy).toLowerCase();
      var match = hay.indexOf(q) !== -1;
      card.hidden = !match;
      if (match) shown++;
    });
    count.textContent = String(shown);
  }

  input.addEventListener('input', applyFilter);
});
</script>
```
